exact_quote: In December 2019, Powdr opened Woodward Park City youth sports complex.
notes: No dedicated Wikipedia article for Woodward Park City (/wiki/Woodward_Park_City returns 404). Only mention is in the Powdr (parent company) article confirming opening date December 2019 and Park City, UT location. exact_quote: Pioneer Mountain has a summit elevation of 9,859 feet (3,005 m); The mountain has 2200 acres for skiing; Snowfall averages approximately 300 inches a year and is very consistent from year to year and week to week; located in Madison County, just west of Big Sky, Montana; CrossHarbor Capital Partners
notes: Wikipedia 'Yellowstone Club' article. Summit elevation 9,859 ft (Pioneer Mountain). Annual snowfall ~300 inches. Owner CrossHarbor Capital Partners (acquired 2009 for $115M). Article mentions 'several lifts' but no specific count; no base elevation, no trail count, no snowmaking %, no services data, no season dates.
